data.title: DOGE: 95 contracts cancelled, saving about $115 million
U.S. Government Cancels Contracts, Saving Millions
data.description: According to Odaily, the U.S. government's efficiency department, DOGE, announced on the X platform that 95 contracts have been canceled, resulting in savings of approximately $115 million, with a potential maximum value of around $235 million. Among the canceled contracts are two from the U.S. Department of Agriculture: one valued at $265,000 for a 'Food and Nutrition Service 3-Day Leadership Seminar' in Atlanta, and another worth $30,000 for 'Study Tour Services in Malaysia.'

data.title: Decentralized AI Transforms With Deepseek's Influence
data.description:
According to Odaily, Pandu Fund has released a report titled 'Decentralized AI Transforms With Deepseek's Influence,' highlighting the evolving narrative of decentralized AI. The report suggests that Web3 AI companies are focusing on replicating DeepSeek's success while offering new advantages such as multimodal capabilities, user ownership, censorship resistance, and privacy. It is anticipated that the number of projects on the supply side will continue to grow, and consumer-facing projects will begin to compete with Web2 counterparts by building networks with community participation. Over the next year, AI models developed on a complete Web3 AI stack are expected to emerge.

Additionally, companies combining AI and crypto are shifting their strategies to focus on infrastructure development rather than model creation. Companies in the GPU market, such as Akash, Render, IoNet, and Exabits, have developed sustainable revenue models. Meanwhile, enterprises like Grass and Gradient, which allow users to share network bandwidth, have found their market niche by providing distributed network services to Web2 clients.

In terms of inference tasks, the performance gap between small and large models is narrowing. This development indicates that Web3 can utilize these streamlined models for efficient inference operations without relying on the massive computing power of traditional AI giants. As this trend progresses, more inference endpoints driven by decentralized computing networks may emerge in the future.

data.title: LayerZero Foundation multi-signature address transfers 1 million ZRO to Coinbase, worth $3.06 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, the LayerZero Foundation multi-signature address transferred 1 million ZRO to Coinbase 7 hours ago, worth $3.06 million. The address currently holds 77.91 million ZRO, with a total value of up to $238 million.

data.title: ARKM's 24-hour trading volume exceeded US$150 million, and Gate.io's trading share ranked second in the world
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to CoinGecko data, ARKM's daily trading volume exceeded 150 million US dollars, and the increase expanded by more than 10%. Among them, Gate.io's trading volume exceeded 16 million US dollars, accounting for 10.34% of the trading volume, ranking second in the world, second only to Binance.

data.title: Opinion: Decentralized AI has changed because of Deepseek, and it is expected that AI models developed based on the complete Web3 AI stack will continue to emerge
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Pandu Fund released a research report "Decentralized AI Changes Because of Deepseek", which pointed out that the decentralized AI narrative is constantly being reshaped. Web3 AI companies can focus on replicating DeepSeek's success while providing new advantages such as multimodality, user ownership, anti-censorship and privacy. It is expected that the number of supply-side projects will continue to grow, and consumer-oriented projects will also begin to compete with Web2 competitors by building community-participated networks. In the coming year, AI models developed based on the complete Web3 AI stack will emerge one after another.
In addition, companies that combine AI with encryption have gradually adjusted their strategies to focus on infrastructure construction rather than model development. For example, companies in the GPU market such as Akash, Render, IoNet and Exabits have developed sustainable revenue models. At the same time, companies such as Grass and Gradient that allow users to share network bandwidth have found market positioning in providing services such as distributed networks to Web2 customers. In reasoning tasks, the performance gap between small models and large models is narrowing, which means that Web3 does not need to rely on the huge computing power of traditional AI giants to use these streamlined models for efficient reasoning operations. As this trend develops, we may see more reasoning endpoints driven by decentralized computing networks in the future.

data.title: Suspicious Transaction Detected On BSC Chain Linked To StepHeroNFTs
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 21, BlockSec Phalcon reported a suspicious transaction on the BSC chain involving a contract associated with the inactive NFT project StepHeroNFTs. The transaction has been identified as a typical reentrancy attack. The contract is not open-source, and the attack has resulted in a loss of approximately $90,000.

data.title: The whale who bought SHADOW at an average price of $9.75 20 days ago has made a profit of $1.72 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to lmk.fun (formerly Scopescan), a whale has earned $1.72 million by trading Sonic Ecosystem DeFi token SHADOW.
20 days ago, the whale spent $100,700 to buy 10,324 SHADOWs at an average price of $9.75. Today, 9,300 tokens were sold at a total value of $1.629 million, with an average selling price of $175; 1,000 tokens are still held, worth about $190,000.

data.title: Security Alert Issued for Multiverse Insights Reentrancy Vulnerability
data.description: According to Odaily, security firm SlowMist has reported on the X platform that a reentrancy attack vulnerability has been detected related to Multiverse Insights (@StepHeroNFTs). Users are advised to remain vigilant and prioritize safety.

data.title: BNB Chain: usdx.money sponsors BNB AI Hack with prize money exceeding $10,000
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News BNB Chain posted on the X platform that usdx.money sponsored BNB Chain to launch BNB AI Hack:
·Total prize money exceeds $10,000
·Accelerate AI-driven asset management on BNB Chain
·Develop with the world's top developers
